Words of the Spoken  
 


WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Words of the Spoken

WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Combinable
Stackable:20
Merchant Value:0 pp 4 gp 5 sp 0 cp
Submitted By:Fleven
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-11 10:16:19
Page Updated:Sat Sep 7th, 2019

Average Price: 5pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: No Longer Dropped
Level to Attain: 1
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

This item was phased out as part of the 2007 revamping of the spell research system.


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
Spoken, spooked!
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2007 at 5:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591870937601
30 posts
Greetings!
Back in the Stromm Server, I killed for about 1 hour in the Field of Bone, and nada.
Went up to the Tower and sweept many floors...
I killed the Jester 3 times!!!!, one with the Iksar Berserker Club.
Many Thick, Fingered, the named Burynai...
Every single Burynai Excavator and lesser icebone skeleton that crossed my sight...
About 3 hours killing, and got about 7 different pages.
Not a single Spoken word.

Good hunting!

Wonka.
▲ Page top
Kurn's Tower
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2007 at 7:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591902728995
View User Forum
16 posts
The Burynai Excavators in Kurns Tower dropped both this and the Words of Possesion for me today. Odd, Possesion was not listed as drops from those but oh well, I didn't need to go far. I kinda waited a long to time to make a level 15 spell... LoL

They both dropped in the area through the pit from the basement. Took me about an hour to get.

Tellulah Torment - 72nd level Necromancer of Luclin
http://eq.magelo.com/profile/1345214
▲ Page top
Kurns
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2005 at 4:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592764520129
View User Forum
10 posts
I am not sure what i did wrong. I killed every floor for 3 hours, didn't drop. Kurns is a pita :/
▲ Page top
RE: Kurns
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2005 at 6:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362939651
309 posts
Lesser Icebones aren't super common in Kurn's (lots of other trash in the way). I have got this from Burynai in Field of Bone before. FoB would be easier in my opinion even if the drop is rarer there, as you can see the burynai from far off and they are mostly in the centre of the zone (the newb pit if you like).

Good luck with your hunt.
▲ Page top
Not to common
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2005 at 1:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1636936009095
View User Forum
10 posts
hi all,
Tried my luck with the Lavaspiiner Elete's in Lavastorm....
By the time it had dropped, I had looted:

Words of,
Reviviscence,
Imitation,
Spirit,
Tyranny,
Possession,
The Sentinent (Azia),
The Element, and The Spoken...

Also had drops of:
Tasarin's Grimoire,
23rt, 24 rt. and lt, 26 rt. and lt.

Runes of,
Substance, Proximity, and Nagafen.

Gems, Onyx, Carnelian, Star Rose Quartz, Pearl, Jasper, and Bloodstone...

Keep on Researchin :)

Angelea 22 DE Necro, Reasearch lvl 75

P.S. BTW, I went for the higher lvl mob, because I notice when drops are less common, they seem to drop better from the higher lvl mobs..

Take care all, Angelea


Edited, Fri Jul 8 14:02:41 2005

got these off of a shark last night in OoT
▲ Page top
Found in unrest
QuoteReply
# Nov 15 2004 at 2:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595176634716
95 posts
Got these words 2 times in Unrest. The first time it dropped off dark boned skeleton. The second was off a ghoul. These words are very very rare, I obtained about 25 words of possession before I got 1 Words of the Spoken at the same camp. It took 3 days obliterating first floor of the mansion for these words.

Edited, Mon Nov 15 14:28:51 2004

Like anything else, people have to take the time to look at the mob that dropped it, then actually have the curtesy to send that info in for it to of help to others. Sites like this rely mostly on info sent in by players.
